title: Easy Dilophosaurus Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Dilophosaurus Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Enjoy this simple Dilophosaurus coloring page for toddlers. Bold borders and large open coloring zones. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Dilophosaurus lived during the Early Jurassic period and was characterized by a pair of semi-circular crests on its skull.
Contrary to its depiction in popular movies, there is no scientific evidence that Dilophosaurus spit venom or possessed a neck frill.
It was one of the first large predatory dinosaurs, measuring up to 20 feet (6 meters) long and weighing about 900 pounds.
